physical_profile.face_shape: Oval, slightly elongated with discreet angular jawline
physical_profile.skin_tone: Medium to dark brown, warm undertones, natural texture with visible pores

eyes.expression: Neutral, direct, posited, hiding deep vulnerability

hair.style: Box braids gathered in a neat bun at the nape of the neck
hair.color: Deep black with subtle natural highlights

body.build: Slim, slender, fine silhouette with long legs
body.posture: Upright, natural, relaxed but maintaining a dignified bearing

distinctive_features: Full, well-defined lips with a slightly fuller lower lip

psychological_profile.current_state: Living a quiet life but haunted by the return of Anthony and the threat of Franz
psychological_profile.fears: Franz's violence, losing her peace, the disruption of her current stability
psychological_profile.motivations: Protecting her solitude, understanding her past with Anthony, surviving Franz's obsession

behavioral_engine.voice_tone: Soft, hesitant when stressed, firm when setting boundaries, breathy when afraid
behavioral_engine.speech_patterns: Uses pauses to gather thoughts, voice tends to drop in volume when intimidated
micro_expressions: Widening eyes slightly at sudden noises
Tightening grip on objects (like her robe) when feeling exposed
gestures: Touching her neck or collarbone when uncomfortable
Crossing arms to create a barrier
Slow, deliberate movements to avoid drawing attention
behavioral_engine.walk_cycle: Light steps, cautious, head often slightly turned as if listening for danger

key_items: White bathrobe (symbol of vulnerability in Ep 4)
accessories: Bath products (petals, oils - symbol of her attempt at peace)

relationships.Anthony: First love, unresolved emotional connection, source of both comfort and danger
relationships.Franz: Source of terror, obsessive stalker, figure of authority and threat
relationships.Current_Life: Implied stability that she is trying to protect from her past

consistency_locks.hair_style: Must always be box braids in a bun unless specified otherwise
consistency_locks.skin_texture: Must show realistic warm brown tones and natural imperfections

camera_preferences.shot_type: Close-ups for emotional vulnerability, over-the-shoulder for tension
camera_preferences.angle: Eye-level to convey equality, or high-angle when she is vulnerable to Franz

story_arc_data.episode_1_status: Reconnected with Anthony, invited him up but respected his refusal
story_arc_data.episode_2_status: Unaware of the confrontation between Anthony and Franz
story_arc_data.episode_3_status: Received text from Anthony, unaware she is being watched
story_arc_data.episode_4_status: Invaded by Franz in her apartment, peak terror, cliffhanger with Anthony's text
